items.line_en: Good morning, sir. Good morning, everyone. How are you sir? Fine, thanks. How are you? Great. Come and please. Nice to meet you. My name is Kate. Nice to meet you too. Sit down, please. Thank you.

coach.say: Good morning, sir. Good morning, everyone. How are you sir? Fine, thanks. How are you? Great. Come and please. Nice to meet you. My name is Kate. Nice to meet you too. Sit down, please. Thank you.
